name: padel-telegram-miniapp
description: Multi-tenant Telegram Mini App for organising casual padel tournaments (SWA Free + managed Functions + Cosmos DB free tier).

scripts.dev: swa start http://localhost:5173 --api-location api --run "npm --workspace app run dev"
scripts.build: npm --workspace app run build && npm --workspace api run build
scripts.lint: npm --workspace app run lint && npm --workspace api run lint
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace app run typecheck && npm --workspace api run typecheck
scripts.test: npm --workspace app run test --if-present && npm --workspace api run test --if-present
scripts.clean: rimraf app/dist api/dist app/node_modules api/node_modules node_modules
